sentences.arabic: يَحْلُمُ سَامِي أَنْ يُصْبِحَ مُهَنْدِسًا مِعْمَارِيًّا فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Sami sanja da u budućnosti postane arhitekta.
sentences.translationEn: Sami dreams of becoming an architect in the future.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يُحِبُّ رَسْمَ الْمَبَانِي وَتَصْمِيمَ الْبُيُوتِ الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Voli crtati zgrade i dizajnirati moderne kuće.
sentences.translationEn: He loves drawing buildings and designing modern houses.

sentences.arabic: يَدْرُسُ الْآنَ بِجِدٍّ فِي الْجَامِعَةِ لِيَنَالَ الشَّهَادَةَ.
sentences.translation: Sada naporno uči na univerzitetu kako bi stekao diplomu.
sentences.translationEn: He is now studying hard at the university to obtain the degree.

sentences.arabic: اخْتِيَارُ الْمِهْنَةِ الْمُنَاسِبَةِ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى تَفْكِيرٍ عَمِيقٍ.
sentences.translation: Odabir odgovarajuće profesije zahtijeva duboko razmišljanje.
sentences.translationEn: Choosing the right profession requires deep thinking.
